title: taraxacum acutiformatum
intro: Taraxacum acutiformatum, also known as the sharp-leafed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum acutiformatum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or capsule, and is often used as a natural remedy in herbal medicine.
